headline: Jim Cramer Says “Only Consolidation” Can Save Food Stocks Like Campbell’s
summary: The Campbell’s Company (NASDAQ:CPB) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed on Mad Money, along with the recent sell-off in the market. Cramer highlighted the stock’s performance during the episode and commented: The food stocks have been unbearable. I mean, they’re just disastrous. Campbell’s reports on Monday, and here’s a stock that’s down 22% for […]
